title: calycocorsus hieracioides

parts: Calycocorsus hieracioides has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, roots, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The leaves of Calycocorsus hieracioides are rich in flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. side_effects: Calycocorsus hieracioides can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. Overconsumption of the plant may lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its extracts can cause skin redness, itching, and blisters.
